items.name: microvm-demo
items.description: Example of running AWS Lambda MicroVMs with Claude Code and the AWS MCP plugin — deploys infra, builds a custom image, launches/suspends/resumes MicroVMs, and executes code inside them via natural language prompts.

items.name: flask-azure-k8s
items.description: This project automates the process of building Docker images, pushing them to Azure Container Registry (ACR), updating Kubernetes manifests, and deploying the application to Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS).

items.name: aws-cdk-chatbot
items.description: Serverless chatbot API built with AWS CDK, API Gateway, Lambda, and Amazon Bedrock for LLM-powered conversations

items.name: railsflow-ci
items.description: Production-grade CI/CD pipeline reference for Ruby on Rails — GitHub Actions, EKS, Helm, Terragrunt

items.name: rubyrana
items.description: Ruby SDK for building agentic AI with tools, streaming, MCP, and extensible tool loading.

items.name: bedrock-agents-collab
items.description: Terraform infrastructure for AWS Bedrock multi-agent collaboration system. Showcased at AWS Summit Toronto 2025 - demonstrates AI agents working together using AWS Bedrock foundation models.

items.name: gitlab-on-ecs
items.description: Privately host your Gitlab environment on AWS ECS with Fargate deployment! Used terraform for IaC. Key components are S3 bucket, redis cluster for caching, PostgresSql Database, and EFS Volumes

items.name: ajaydhungel.me
items.description: My personal portfolio built using Hugo Framework and Charlola template !

items.name: k8s-gitops
items.description: Full GitOps lifecycle on AWS EKS — FastAPI, Nginx, MongoDB, Redis deployed via ArgoCD and Helm, with Jenkins CI/CD and Terraform + Terragrunt IaC

items.name: fpl-agent
items.description: AI assistant for Fantasy Premier League (Fantasy Football) — built with the Strands framework and FPL API, helps with transfers, captain picks, and squad decisions

items.name: docker
items.description: Multi-stack app with Docker, Nginx reverse proxy, Jenkins pipelines, and GitHub Actions CI/CD

items.name: SpringBoot_Demo
items.description: Spring Boot app on EKS with DocumentDB, Terraform IaC for ECR and networking, and GitHub Actions CI/CD

items.name: argo
items.description: GitOps-managed WordPress deployment on Kubernetes using ArgoCD and Helm with dev, staging, and prod environments
